content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To      :   Richard Katz                                  Date    :   February 26, 1986
                                                                      No. M-86-075


From    :   FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
            Robert E. Leidigh

Subject :   Memorandum Memorializing Telephone Advice to Assemblyman
            Richard Katz


            This date, rendered attached advice to Assemblyman Richard
Katz.  Advised that payment of entry fee for Baja 1000 Off-Road
Race ($350) by car owner was not gift to Katz where he was
needed as a co-driver (rules require driver and co-driver) and he
drove at least 1/3 of race, plus timing, etc.  There was
quid pro quo sufficient to negate any gift.  He paid his own
way there, etc.  No payments to him.  Therefore, he need not
disclose on his SEI, even though driver/owner is a lobbyist.

sections.question:
SEI reporting that your he went along as passenger in an off-road race in the US. The driver paid for - driver who paid for is a lobbyist - had a passenger, but fee is $350 - finished second in division prize was awarded to & retained by the driver.

Advice:
Katz just now got all the info.
Is willing to pay back his share of that if we're permitted. He paid his way down & all other expenses.

2/26/86 Contacted at Treanor P & Kathy D.
We'll agree that there appears to be good for quite here - special circumstances involving the requirement of co-driver/passenger for the race.
He drove part of way and helped navigate it free (he gifted).

Regulations: ____________________________ Act: ____
Opinions: _____________________________ Guide to PRA: ____
Advice Letters: _______________________
Other: _______________________________

TELEPHONE ADVICE

Atty: Leidig
Date: 8/26/76
Requestor: Presently your Richard Katz
Tele: 5-1616

Question:
SEI reporting
Katz that you be sent along as passenger in an off-road race in the US - driver paid fee - driver who paid fee is a lobbyist - had a passenger, but fee is same regardless entry fee.
$3.50 - finalist record in Drama prize was awarded to & shared by the driver.

Advice:
Katz just now got all this info.
Is willing to pay back his share of that $3.50 if permitted. He paid his way down toll & other expenses.

3/6/86 Contacted at Jeanne P & Kathy D.
We all agree that there appears to be good for you here - special circumstances involving the requirement of co-driver/passenger for the race.
He drove part of way and helped navigate it free (no gift).

Regulations: ____________________________ Act: ____
Opinions: ______________________________ Guide to PRA: ____
Advice
Letters: ________________________________
Other: _________________________________

TO: Bob L.
FROM: M. Assemblyman Katz
DATE: 2/26
TIME: 9:51 AM
MESSAGE: #445-1616

The form also includes checkboxes for "PHONED," "CALL BACK," "RETURNED CALL," "WANTS TO SEE YOU," "WILL CALL AGAIN," "WAS IN," and "URGENT," but none of these boxes are checked.

The form is labeled "AIGNER FORM NO. 50-176."

The memo states: This date, rendered attached advice to Assemblyman Richard Katz. Advised that payment of entry fee for Baja 1000 Off-Road Race ($350) by car owner was not gift to Katz where he was needed as co-driver (rules require driver and co-driver) and he drove at least 1/3 of race, plus timing, etc. There was quid pro quo sufficient to negate any gift. He paid his own way there, etc. No payments to him. Therefore, he need not disclose on his SEI, even though driver/owner is a lobbyist. The driver paid for - driver who paid for is a lobbyist - had a passenger, but fee is $350 - finished second in division prize was awarded to & retained by the driver. Advice: Katz just now got all the info. Is willing to pay back his share of that if we're permitted. He paid his way down & all other expenses. 2/26/86 Contacted at Treanor P & Kathy D. We'll agree that there appears to be good for quite here - special circumstances involving the requirement of co-driver/passenger for the race. He drove part of way and helped navigate it free (he gifted).
